machine.name: Agriculture Indoor Grow House Water Treatment Maintenance
machine.description: Agriculture domain machine for indoor grow house operations focused on water treatment maintenance. It monitors filter life, RO rejection rate, UV status, and storage tank hygiene and emits AI-dispatchable outputs at [3593:3597] for automation, maintenance, and optimization workflows.

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: filter life, RO rejection rate, UV status, and storage tank hygiene
metadata.predictiveManagementRole: Primary source machine for water treatment maintenance predictive management signals.
agentActions: Dispatch growhouse_crop_steering_agent to stabilize water treatment maintenance and record corrective action.
Run AI optimization for water treatment maintenance using the latest operating window and production targets.
Create preventive-maintenance work for water treatment maintenance and verify completion telemetry.
Continue automated monitoring for water treatment maintenance while preserving current setpoints.

sensorNormalization.process_stability_norm: 0.0=unstable or outside safe operating band; 0.5=watch band; 1.0=stable in target band
sensorNormalization.biosecurity_or_ipm_norm: 0.0=active biological threat; 0.5=mitigated watch state; 1.0=controlled and documented
sensorNormalization.maintenance_readiness_norm: 0.0=overdue or faulted; 0.5=service due soon; 1.0=maintained and verified

metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [3593:3597] feeds agriculture automation and AI dispatch orchestration.

sequences.name: Water Treatment Maintenance: NORMAL -> WATCH -> CRITICAL -> URGENT_STABILIZE

metadata.description: Escalates from stable operation to a critical process or welfare risk.

metadata.name: NORMAL
metadata.description: Operating window is stable and maintenance is current.

metadata.name: WATCH
metadata.description: Efficiency and maintenance signals are weakening.

metadata.name: CRITICAL
metadata.description: Operation requires immediate stabilization and AI dispatch.

metadata.action: Dispatch growhouse_crop_steering_agent to stabilize water treatment maintenance and record corrective action.

metadata.description: Fires when the process is safe but AI can improve yield, welfare, resource use, or labor timing.

metadata.name: OPTIMIZATION_WINDOW
metadata.description: Optimization can improve the operating plan before risk accumulates.

metadata.action: Run AI optimization for water treatment maintenance using the latest operating window and production targets.

metadata.description: Fires when service should be scheduled before a fault or production loss.

metadata.name: SERVICE_DUE
metadata.description: Maintenance work should be created while the operation remains controllable.

metadata.action: Create preventive-maintenance work for water treatment maintenance and verify completion telemetry.

metadata.description: Fires when the operation is stable and should continue under current automation settings.

metadata.name: STABLE
metadata.description: Current setpoints are acceptable and no intervention is required.

metadata.action: Continue automated monitoring for water treatment maintenance while preserving current setpoints.

inputSequences.name: Escalation to urgent stabilization
inputSequences.description: A stable operation degrades through watch conditions and then reaches a critical state.

inputSequences.name: Optimization opportunity
inputSequences.description: AI can improve production, welfare, efficiency, or labor timing before critical risk appears.

inputSequences.name: Preventive maintenance required
inputSequences.description: Maintenance should be scheduled before a preventable failure occurs.

inputSequences.name: Stable operating window
inputSequences.description: The process is inside the target operating band and should continue monitoring.

inputSequences.name: Normal baseline without output
inputSequences.description: A single normal signal arms the escalation path without dispatching an agent.
